name: Rotation Side Book (v2 — barbell)
version: 2 — replaces the v1 large-cap value screen after curator feedback ('too boring / low upside; down=broken'). Rebuilt as a barbell of catalyst-driven asymmetric small/mid-caps + 2 overlooked-quality anchors.
mandate: Asymmetric, catalyst-driven, under-followed names that benefit as money rotates off the crowded AI mega-cap trade post-war. Barbell: ~50% asymmetric small/mid-caps with hard recent catalysts + ~30% overlooked-quality anchors (real cash flow / franchise) + ~20% cash. 6-18mo; higher-risk than the After Hours book by design.
selection_filter: (1) a HARD, recent, specific catalyst (govt award, hyperscaler deal, equity stake) — not 'it's cheap'; (2) real upside (2-3x potential on the asymmetric sleeve); (3) NOT a falling knife on deteriorating fundamentals (catalyst names that pulled back on sector beta are OK, flagged); (4) under-followed vs the consensus AI/value names.

current_holdings.thesis: Atomic utility for AI: $18B Amazon deal, 1,920MW Susquehanna nuclear through 2042, co-located hyperscale datacenters. 2026 EBITDA guide $1.75-2.05B / FCF ~$1B, +43% EBITDA growth. Real cash flow, working (-10% off high) — the quality anchor, less crowded than CEG/VST.

Edge-network franchise turning into an AI-inference + Zero-Trust platform. Workers AI = a call option on inference moving to the edge. Working (-17% off high), enterprise large-deal momentum. The franchise anchor with real asymmetric optionality, not a value rebound.

Bitcoin miner re-rating into AI/HPC infrastructure: $3B 10-yr Fluidstack hosting deal, Google 5.4% equity stake + $1.4B backstop, 300MW Barber Lake leased, plus an AWS deal. +697% off lows, only -8% off high — working hard on a hard catalyst. The cleanest asymmetric setup in the book.

Under-followed AI-power picks-and-shovels: energy-engineering services seeing record demand for grid/data-center power upgrades. Mid-cap, +64% off lows. Owns the grid-upgrade labor the AI buildout needs without the crowded GEV/ETN multiple.

Government-backed critical-minerals asymmetry: Trump admin 10% stake ($1.6B), Serra Verde (~$2.8B) acquisition for the Pela Ema deposit. Geopolitical catalyst (China REE export controls). +133% off lows; volatile — sized accordingly.

Space-adjacent, under-followed: LEO satellite IoT + the new NTN/direct-to-device service — a real call option on D2D connectivity scaling. Working (-19% off high), recurring revenue base underneath the optionality.

The HALEU bet: only NRC-approved US high-assay enrichment producer (the fuel SMRs need; Russia was the prior source). $900M DOE award, Piketon Ohio expansion, Oklo/Palantir/Fluor partners. DOWN 64% off high — but that's the nuclear-sector derate, not Centrus losing its monopoly. Catalyst, not broken; sized as a speculative bet.

Lottery-ticket sleeve: laser enrichment + medical/specialty isotopes + Quantum Leap Energy HALEU MOU (European reactor fuel from 2028), >$300M long-term EBITDA target. Pre-scale, binary — money you can lose entirely; size like a ticket.

cash_rationale: Higher-risk book; dry powder for the choppy rotation tape and to add to catalyst names on confirmation. Speculative sleeve (ASPI/LEU) sized small on purpose.

history.note: v1 was de-rated large-cap value (ADP/ICE/KKR/MOH/SCCO...). Curator: 'trash picks — too boring/low-upside, down=broken.' Replaced.
Barbell: TLN+NET anchors; CIFR/WLDN/USAR/IRDM/LEU asymmetric; ASPI speculative. 80% invested / 20% cash. Research: wiki/analyses/2026-06-16-rotation-side-portfolio.md
